<?php declare(strict_types=1); /* * This file is part of the league/config package. * * (c) Colin O'Dell <colinodell@gmail.com> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace League\Config; /** * An interface that provides the ability to set both the schema and configuration values */ interface ConfigurationBuilderInterface extends MutableConfigurationInterface, SchemaBuilderInterface { }
